parameters.query: SELECT value FROM pipemind.system_state WHERE key = 'roster_valid';

parameters.errorMessage: F-14: Roster is not valid. Run Workflow 00 (Startup / Config Validation) first.

parameters.query: SELECT feature_area, status_summary, has_blocker, source, last_primary_signal_at, updated_at FROM pipemind.project_signals ORDER BY updated_at DESC;
SELECT question_text, answer_text, feature_area, asked_at FROM pipemind.qa_history WHERE answer_text IS NOT NULL ORDER BY asked_at DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT standup_date, raw_text, feature_area, has_blocker FROM pipemind.standup_records WHERE discord_id = $1 AND standup_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY standup_date DESC LIMIT 7;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT discord_id) AS developer_count, COUNT(DISTINCT feature_area) AS area_count FROM pipemind.standup_records WHERE has_blocker = TRUE AND standup_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days';
SELECT discord_id, role FROM pipemind.roster WHERE discord_id = $1 AND active = true;
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS active_developer_count FROM pipemind.roster WHERE active = TRUE AND role = 'developer';
